title: Universal Co Roofing & Plumbing Pty Ltd — Government accountability
investigation_objective: The Fair Work Ombudsman commenced Federal Circuit and Family Court proceedings against Universal Co Roofing & Plumbing Pty Ltd and its sole director, alleging underpayment of minimum wages, overtime and unpaid accrued leave affecting a young apprentice and a migrant (Indian visa-holder) worker, after a September 2025 Compliance Notice was allegedly not satisfied. Maximum potential penalty exposure of $99,000 for the company and $19,800 for the director; a directions hearing is listed for 4 September 2026.
scope: Subject of Fair Work Ombudsman Federal Circuit and Family Court proceedings alleging underpayment of a young apprentice and a migrant worker; Proceedings allege a prior Compliance Notice was not satisfied before litigation was commenced; Matter involves visa-holder and apprentice workers, cohorts the Fair Work Ombudsman treats as particularly vulnerable to exploitation
